title: koeleria pubescens var. barrelieri
intro: Koeleria pubescens var. barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's hair-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is valued for its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which provide various health benefits, including relief from bloating, indigestion, and urinary tract infections. Koeleria pubescens var. barrelieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat the mentioned health issues and promote overall well-being.
